ogTitle: Tintaldra vs Tol Tol: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tintaldra and Tol Tol.
heading: Tintaldra vs Tol Tol — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tintaldra, Victoria and Tol Tol, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tintaldra has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tol Tol (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tintaldra or Tol Tol safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tintaldra has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Tol Tol scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tintaldra scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Tol Tol scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tintaldra or Tol Tol?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tintaldra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
